EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IJSONArray

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides simplified DOM-like JSON serialization and de-serialization API.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4ABE3BC0-6D3C-4FBA-9C55-C9AC7C32D9B1")]
public interface IJSONArray

Properties

Count

Returns an array size.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Value[int]

Returns an array value at a given index. Returns E_INVALIDARG if index is out of bounds.

object Value[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Add(object)

Adds new variant value to the array.

void Add(object Value)

Parameters

Value object

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddBoolean(bool)

Adds new boolean value to the array.

void AddBoolean(bool Value)

Parameters

Value bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDate(DateTime)

Adds new DATE value to the array.

void AddDate(DateTime Value)

Parameters

Value DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDouble(double)

Adds new double value to the array.

void AddDouble(double Value)

Parameters

Value double

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDoubleEx(double, int)

Adds new double value to the array. Stores precision for use in ToJSON and ToJSONString

void AddDoubleEx(double Value, int precision)

Parameters

Value double
precision int

Adds new null value to the array.

Adds new string value to the array.

ClearAll()

Removes all values.

Sample Snippet

CreateMemberArray(out IJSONArray)

Creates and adds new member to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if creation of the member fails.

void CreateMemberArray(out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Value IJSONArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateMemberObject(out IJSONObject)

Creates and adds new member to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if creation of the member fails.

void CreateMemberObject(out IJSONObject Value)

Parameters

Value IJSONObject

Sample Snippet

IsValueNull(int)

Checks if an array value at a given index is NULL.

Index int

bool

Parses JSON array from string into memory.

RemoveValue(int)

Remove a value from the member collection.

ToJSON(string, IJSONWriter)

Parameters

objectName string
pWriter IJSONWriter

ToJSONString(IPropertySet) 

string ToJSONString(IPropertySet props)

Parameters

props IPropertySet

Returns

string

TryGetValueAsArray(int, out IJSONArray)

Returns array value at a given index as IJSONArray. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsArray(int Index, out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value IJSONArray

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsBoolean(int, out bool)

Returns array value at a given index as boolean. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsBoolean(int Index, out bool Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value bool

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDate(int, out DateTime)

Returns array value at a given index as DATE. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsDate(int Index, out DateTime Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value DateTime

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDouble(int, out double)

Returns array value at a given index as double. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsDouble(int Index, out double Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value double

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsLong(int, out int)

Returns array value at a given index as long. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsLong(int Index, out int Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value int

Returns

bool

TryGetValueAsObject(int, out IJSONObject)

Value IJSONObject

TryGetValueAsString(int, out string)
